Schema: {"properties": {"hours": {"description": "The hour on the clock face.", "type": "integer"}, "minutes": {"description": "The minutes on the clock face.", "type": "integer"}, "round_to": {"description": "The number of decimal places to round the result to, default is 2.", "type": "integer"}}, "required": ["hours", "minutes"], "type": "object"}
